category_sources: source_facts.description says filtered read-only filesystem for FUSE; official README describes a FUSE filesystem that mounts a filtered read-only directory tree.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is rofs-filtered; official repository is gburca/rofs-filtered.
docs_sources: official GitHub README is the best documentation surface and includes build, usage, configuration, and tips.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/gburca/rofs-filtered, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: official README describes FUSE, read-only mounting, and regex-based filtering; source_facts.executables lists a CLI.
